# RMinder 1.4.0 — Immutable reports, carry-forward card, notifications

Release date: 2025-11-18

## Highlights
- Immutable history: closed-period reports stay fixed thanks to full snapshot archival.
- Carry-forward income: editable/deletable card on the Budget page; only shown when present.
- Notifications: budget alerts and daily reminders, with Android 13+ runtime permission and an “Enable notifications” menu.

## Added
- Comprehensive period archival on Close:
  - Spending by category
  - Liabilities (planned vs paid)
  - Sinking funds (monthly vs contributed)
  - Budget and income snapshots preserved
- Reports for closed periods read snapshots only (planned, actual/extras, spending). Editing the active period no longer mutates past reports.
- Global Close Period action from any page.
- Reports header polish: centered period label; Jump button aligned at far right.
- Notifications:
  - Local notifications for over/near budget alerts and a daily “record spending” reminder.
  - Android 13+ permission flow; “Enable notifications” menu opens settings if denied.

## Changed
- Budget page: carry-forward shown as a normal income-style card; appears only when non-zero.
- Removed “Unspent amount” line and the carry-forward note in Reports Budget Summary.
- Restored Reports layout to previous UI: full-width summary and consistent section headings.

## Fixed
- Prevent closing on the active period’s start day (invalid close range).
- Avoided “setState() called after dispose()” on Budget page via mounted guards.
- Android build reliability:
  - Enabled core library desugaring and upgraded notifications plugin.
  - Added POST_NOTIFICATIONS permission and runtime request handling.

## Internal
- DB version bumped to 11 with new snapshot tables:
  - `spending_snapshots(period_start, category_id, category_name, spent)`
  - `liability_snapshots(period_start, liability_id, liability_name, category_id, planned, paid)`
  - `fund_snapshots(period_start, fund_id, fund_name, category_id, monthly_contribution, contributed)`

## Downloads
- APK: `build/app/outputs/flutter-apk/app-release.apk`
- SHA256: `7A5A74A73846DE79C8A879AF4F96E614AA28A2F750398B81B6915E8BB968E90A`

## Upgrade notes
- No migrations required by users; the app upgrades the database automatically.
- On Android 13+, users may need to grant notification permission on first launch (or via Reports → More → Enable notifications).
